A concise, relevant quote that summarizes the core idea of your presentation can be placed here.

Before we turn your idea into a polished pitch or presentation, start by writing it down in a short document.

Use clear, simple language to describe the problem, the opportunity, and your solution.

This one-page summary will be the foundation for generating your pitch and slides.

Pitch draft

Title (Working name of the idea)

Make this short and clear (e.g., “AI-powered Resume Builder”).


Problem

  1. What’s the core pain point or challenge?
  2. Why is it important?

Opportunity / Why Now

What has changed that makes this idea relevant today (trends, tech, market shifts)?

Solution

  1. How does your idea solve the problem?
  2. What’s unique about it?


Target Audience

Who benefits the most from this solution?


Impact / Value

  1. What’s the key outcome or benefit for users or the business?


The Ask / Next Step (optional)

  1. What do you want to achieve with this idea (e.g., feedback, investment, prototype)?
Create a structured, impactful deck instantly using Miro AI.
Create a deck by filling in content manually.
Prefer to build your deck manually? Just fill in the template we’ve provided.
